next_experiment: Define the actual minimal-main hard stratum and prove its normalized moment is at most (5/6)m_56 at p=4 ceil(log_2 h).
claim_boundary: No conjecture proof and no certified conjecture counterexample.
proof_boundary: This is a sharp deterministic norm bridge. It supplies no estimate for the actual binary Goldbach residual on the hard stratum and therefore proves no Goldbach representation.
